name_en: Top-tier replica [Exclusive photo M83160] Denim Series. Made with organic cotton, the 'Portefeuille Lou' is finished with Monogram denim featuring a Monogram pattern. Features a gold LV circle pull tab and matching zipper. Despite being a small wallet, it has 6 card slots, a bill compartment, and a coin pocket with zipper on the side. 11.5 x 8.5 x 2.2 cm
